        print(f"BEFORE blue: boundary={n['boundary']}")
for n in seg_after['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'b':
        print(f"AFTER blue: boundary={n['boundary']}")

# Also check green bar
for n in seg_before['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'N':
        print(f"BEFORE green: pixels={n['pixels']}")
for n in seg_after['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'N':
        print(f"AFTER green: pixels={n['pixels']}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
